Category.title: Category
Category.description: Represents a database system as a category

name.description: Human readable name of the system

description.description: Description of what this category represents

objects.description: Names of data schemas or objects contained in this category

Functor.title: Functor
Functor.description: Represents a mapping bridge between data categories

id.description: Unique ID of the functor mapping

reconciliation_expression.description: Expression resolving a conflict if any

GraphEvent.title: GraphEvent
GraphEvent.description: Represents a real-time modification or event affecting the graph

categories/{categoryId}.description: Primary categories of the system graph

functors/{functorId}.description: Functorial linkages mapping source categories to target categories

graph_events/{eventId}.description: Stream of real-time conflict, reconciliation, and validation events
